title: bidens aoraiensis
intro: Bidens aoraiensis, also known as the tropical tick trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Bidens aoraiensis include treating various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties.
